title: macrochordion pabstii
side_effects: Macrochordion pabstii can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its high toxicity levels. Ingestion of the plant's leaves or stems can also lead to abdominal pain, headaches, and dizziness. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap can cause skin irritation, including redness, itching, and blistering. In severe cases, improper use of Macrochordion pabstii can lead to respiratory problems, including shortness of breath and coughing.
